title: Regional Product Safety Offices - Canada.ca
content:
## Regional Product Safety Offices

## Where are you located?
The Consumer Product Safety Program has many offices in Canada, serving different regions and countries. You can contact these offices directly, via post, telephone and e-mail. To contact your designated office, click on the appropriate region below.
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island
- National Capital Region

## Outside Canada and the United States
Choose your country or region to contact the appropriate Canadian Regional Product Safety Office:
